title: The Great Gravel Debate, 32-Inch Wheels, and Ride Audio Confessions
content:
We dive into the controversial Scott prototype at Unbound, argue over what makes the perfect gravel bike, and reveal the top picks from our new Road Bike Buyer's Guide.

Read the full article at The Great Gravel Debate, 32-Inch Wheels, and Ride Audio Confessions on Velo.
author: Josh Ross
